control.description-key: Displays records as interactive markers on a Google Maps canvas

property.name: GoogleMapsApiKey
property.description-key: Your Google Maps JavaScript API key

property.name: LatitudeField
property.description-key: Logical name of the latitude field (e.g. address1_latitude)

property.name: LongitudeField
property.description-key: Logical name of the longitude field (e.g. address1_longitude)

property.name: TitleField
property.description-key: Logical name of the title field shown in the info-window and used for navigation (e.g. name)

property.name: PrimaryMarkerShape
property.description-key: Shape for primary markers: pin, diamond, circle, square, star, store, building, person, question, target, distributor, truck, wrench (default: pin)

property.name: MarkerStyleMapping
property.description-key: JSON mapping option set values to a shape and color. Example: {fieldName,mappings:[{value,shape,color,label}],default:{shape,color}}

property.name: ColorOptionSetField
property.description-key: Logical name of the option set field used to color markers (optional)

property.name: MapHeight
property.description-key: Height of the map in pixels

data-set.name: dataSet
data-set.description-key: View of records to display on the map
